articles.title: ELON MUSK'S XAI BEATS CHATGPT ON LLM BENCHMARKS
articles.summary: xAI trained an autoregressive language model at 34B params. It is quite performant and will power an AI system built into the X platform.

articles.title: WHAT TO EXPECT AT OPENAI DEV DAY
articles.summary: OpenAI Dev Day is today and it is rumored that we can expect enhancements to OpenAI’s developer tools, new pricing plans for ChatGPT, and a peek at Gizmo V8, a new and improved version of the ChatGPT iOS app.

articles.title: EXPANDING VRP FOR ENHANCED GENERATIVE AI SECURITY
HIGHLIGHTS FROM NEURIPS 2023
articles.summary: Paper digest generated summaries of many papers from NeurIPS 2023. Interestingly, much of this work is almost a year old at this point and has already been readily adopted by the community.

articles.title: HELIXNET IS 3 MODELS COMBINED INTO ONE
articles.summary: If you fine-tune three task-specific models from the Mistral base, one for generation, one for critique, and a final one for regeneration then the entire system shows dramatically improved generation performance. Synthetic data is used to tune these models.

articles.title: SKETCH WHAT YOU WANT YOUR ROBOT TO DO
articles.summary: Sketching a rough outline of what you want a robot to accomplish is a novel form of communication and turns out to work surprisingly well for standard pick and place tasks.

articles.title: GISKARD: OPEN-SOURCE TESTING FRAMEWORK FOR LLMS & ML MODELS (GITHUB REPO SPONSOR)
articles.summary: Giskard is a Python library [11] that automatically detects vulnerabilities of AI models, from tabular models to LLM, including: performance biases, data leakage, spurious correlation, hallucination, toxicity, security issues and many more. Get your model to production quickly and safely.

articles.title: Install Giskard (via GitHub) [11] or try it in Colab
DEEPSPEED RELEASES INFERENCE SOFTWARE
articles.summary: This is Deepspeed's new software for competing with vLLM and text-generation interfaces for the fast serving of language models. It comes with many state-of-the-art acceleration features and preliminary results suggest it's up to 2.4x faster.

articles.title: X "SIMILAR POSTS" POWERED BY RUST-BASED VECTOR DATABASE
articles.summary: Qdrant uses a lightning-fast vector database to store embeddings.

articles.title: VIDEO2MUSIC CREATES TAILORED MUSIC FOR VIDEOS
articles.summary: Video2Music’s AI framework generates emotionally congruent music for videos, leveraging a unique dataset and transformer model validated by user studies.

articles.title: AI DATA PIPELINE ATTACKS
articles.summary: Poisoning the data well and other data pipeline attacks are a huge challenge for the cyber security community and often a blindspot for most AI organizations. This post outlines (with code) what the attacks are to help with future mitigation.

articles.title: COULD CRUISE BE THE THERANOS OF AI?
articles.summary: Cruise, GM's driverless car company, frequently relies on remote operators for its vehicles, challenging the company's claims of autonomy. The revelation raises concerns about the true capabilities of self-driving cars and prompts calls for transparency and investigation into the safety and autonomy of such vehicles.

articles.title: EXTENSIONS PROMPT INJECTION AND DATA EXFILTRATION
articles.summary: A great deep dive into some novel vulnerabilities that come from generative AI plugins. In this case, the attack resembles SQL injection but came via an infected Google Doc. While Google has fixed the issue, the security researcher was able to exfiltrate other users’ prompts.

articles.title: 🧑💻🤖 DYSTR: AI POWERED ENGINEERING HUB WITH AUTONOMOUS AGENTS
articles.summary: A collaborative, LLM-infused cloud environment designed for data analysis and storage of engineering materials. With built-in AI Agents, Dystr automates workloads, freeing engineers to focus on core tasks. Join the ranks of engineers at Google, Valve, Meta, & SpaceX.

articles.title: GOOGLE'S RESEARCH SCHOLAR PROGRAM IS OPEN FOR APPLICATIONS
articles.summary: Google's program allows early career postdoc-level researchers to join a team with resources and continue their research agenda.

articles.title: CHATGPT PLUS CAN NOW ANALYZE FILES
articles.summary: The latest update on ChatGPT Plus introduces fresh beta functionalities, including the ability to work with PDFs. Users can upload and interact with documents alongside receiving multimodal assistance.

articles.title: LAYER (PRODUCT)
articles.summary: Layer cuts your research time by 40% with AI-powered summarization, information extraction, and more.
